title: Luscious Sweet and Sour German Sauerkraut Bake
description: A delicious and cozy German-inspired dish featuring sweet chilli sauce, malty, crisp and savory sauerkraut bake, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sauerkraut, sweet chilli sauce, brown sugar, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
In a separate pan, cook the pork sausage slices until browned. Chop into small pieces.
In a large bamboo tray, create a layer of the sauerkraut mixture. Arrange half of the cooked pork sausage on top.
Repeat the layers, starting with the sauerkraut mixture, then the remaining pork sausage.
In a small bowl, mix together the bread crumbs, unsalted butter, and all-purpose flour.
Evenly sprinkle the bread crumb mixture over the top of the sauerkraut layers.
Cover the bamboo tray with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
